sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28689" key="dusaniw=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ᾰνῐῶν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀνιάω</etym>) <sense id="n28689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much vexing</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.106d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
